_comment: Hardware entries injected into pymc_repeater's radio-settings.json by scripts/install.sh. The repeater web UI reads /api/hardware_options which serialises this file; setup_wizard parses 'radio_type' from the chosen entry to decide which config section to populate.

usb_heltec.name: Heltec V3 (USB-CDC modem)
usb_heltec.description: Heltec WiFi LoRa 32 V3 connected by USB cable. Requires the Heltec to run our LoRa modem firmware (firmware/firmware.bin in this repo).

tcp_heltec.name: Heltec V3 (Wi-Fi/TCP modem)
tcp_heltec.description: Heltec WiFi LoRa 32 V3 over LAN. Provision Wi-Fi via the on-device AP portal first, then edit tcp_heltec.host in /etc/pymc_repeater/config.yaml to match the Heltec's IP or mDNS name.
